name: Rsp_responder_chr2R_h41
description: Responder (Rsp) locus at h41 on chr2R pericentric heterochromatin. Tandem array of ~120 bp Rsp satellite repeats; sensitivity to Segregation Distorter (SD) is proportional to copy number — Rsp-insensitive haplotypes have <20 copies, Rsp-sensitive haplotypes have hundreds to thousands. Classic meiotic-drive locus.
expected_copy_count: 20-2500 Rsp repeats (strain-variable, drives the SD/Rsp phenotype)
